Okay, so again the pre-frame is going to again affect dramatically who you attract so next time we talk about this comes back to the Framing this is again more NLP stuff is when someone's hitting a landing page right here So so I'm going to place my ads I'm driving traffic from multiple different streams and again Mason today is going to be talking about a Whole bunch of different streams of traffic, so I'm not going to touch down that right now So let's come to a landing page and this ties back to the ad and the landing page is that you need to understand that people make Decisions in different ways, okay In NLP one of the things they talk a lot about is that people make their decisions based on two things, okay? Either moving towards pleasure or moving away from pain Okay, moving towards pleasure or away from pain so what that means Let's say I am overweight and I want to lose some weight And I see an ad in the diet magazine and the ad is saying hey learn how to get a six-pack get ripped to get hardcore that kind of Stuff, okay, that kind of ad is moving, you know And then when you get ripped you're gonna have a hot babe And you have a huge house and you're gonna have all the other stuff you want in life, okay? That's towards pleasure Okay, and add that's gonna say hey how to make 15 million dollars in 20 seconds. That's towards pleasure Okay, and people who make their decisions based on towards pleasure gonna react respond to that one, okay? No make people make citizen People make their decisions where it's moving away from pain This is stuff like how to get out of debt how to not have to worry about your boss anymore How to do that kind of stuff came people who try to move away from pain? They're making decisions based on that does that make sense so towards pleasure and away from pain And what's interesting is that you really may think hey well people make choices in different ways all the time But the reality is ever since you were born you Somewhere in your early early life depending on how your parents raised you were the experiences you went through Somewhere in our mind we kind of set a blueprint in that blueprint We made decisions of how I how I make my decisions in life Okay, so some of us make our decisions towards pleasure and some make them away from pain Okay, think about think about most of choices you made in your life. Why did you do it? Did you marry the girl? It's our date the girl because she was really hot and you wanted all the pleasure or because I got nothing else to do She's bored. I'm bored. Let's go out. Okay, you making your sentence towards pleasure away from pain Okay, what job do you take they towards pleasure? You want the high salary want this and this and this or is away from pain? This is gonna be easy. I just don't want to worry about it. I'm not kind of thing Okay, now what's interesting is in a usually I take a poll this was kind of a smaller room to do a poll but We did a set stomper and I spoke and I there's like 700 800 people in the room I basically said who here makes their decisions based on towards pleasure and like 90% of room shot their hands up I said who makes their core decisions based on away from pain. There's about 10% of the room Okay, and what's interesting is that most people in that room and most people in this room and most people watching this from home Most of us are entrepreneurs, right? An interesting thing is the entrepreneurs Typically make their their choices based on moving towards pleasure. That's why we want to start our own business We want to do this one of this because they're all very people that want to move towards pleasure But the mass majority of people out there guess how they make their decisions Away from pain but because we're entrepreneurs. We're creating our ads making our websites. We're like hey I don't make a billion dollars in 20 seconds. That's what people want cuz that's what I want Okay, the reality is the masses do not want that kind of a thing Okay, but we keep structuring ads because that's the way that we want it And we understand that we don't think like the majority of people out there You guys that making an ad that says something like how to make a hundred dollars a day is gonna always convert better than how to make a million dollars a year Okay, every single time why how to you know how to pick up a chick because you're gonna be so good looking and is gonna do a Lot less than how to lose the extra 10 pounds you need after the holidays. Okay, it's really interesting You don't think it's that way because you think everyone wants to make a million dollars in 20 seconds But the reality is most people they just want to get out of pain And if you're probably can help me get out of pain they're much more likely to be happy So because of that though you realize that when you're coming back here You need to make different landing pages for different types of people Okay, if you have an ad over here that's talking about how to lose a whole bunch of you know How to how to make a million dollars a year make sure this page over here has got pictures of cars and boats and you know Bling bling and all that kind of craft people like because that's the mindset of the person you're tracking through that ad Make sure it's similar to the landing page over here If you're ads over here about how to get out of debt tomorrow make sure over here is not someone getting out of debt But maybe it's a picture of a family with a home smiling with a kid in front of there with a relaxed feeling like crap We're out of debt. We got our house. Okay, it's all it's little shifts like that But those shifts are huge when you look at the long run. Okay another example this I have a friend here in Boise action He sells this cream for women that does something cool for women I'm not gonna talk about the details of it, but he was driving all this traffic this page, right? This page was it was written towards women and it was telling women how they can use this stuff and all the benefits That came from and all this kind of stuff and they're doing really well So they had a campaign a paperclip campaign was breaking even they were making a little bit of profit They were really happy that it was that it was growing and doing well And then my friend the owner of the company one day He overheard like four or five customer support calls the same in the same day and everything one of them were from men He's like this is weird So he went back and started Monitoring this he found out like 90% of the questions were coming from men who were confused about the product and how it works He's like, huh, this is really interesting. I wonder I wonder if there's anything I can do here So what he did instead of driving people directly to his landing page He set up a page ahead of time He started driving people to it and basically said are you trying by his product? Are you interested in this product because you are a woman you want for yourself or because you're a man you're looking for your For your significant other and if they clicked on the woman it took him this page We click on a man took him to a different page It was written for a man's point of view explaining how this would help their significant other Okay, he started driving traffic through here and what we found was was just insane I can't remember exact numbers It was like 78% of people that were coming this page were men and like what 12% were the women Okay, and he went from having a campaign that was a little bit over break even to just destroying it and their product just shot up And they're making a killing with it right now just because they were meant again come back to the message to Mac Message to market match he's talking about you make sure your message is match matching your market We start a segment he's saying the men go here women go here and the men have a have something that relates to them and women And men do women have something right to them. Does that make sense? I see other people like Alex Mendoza has some squeeze pages are really good They come here and ask for name email and says, you know, what what's the purpose here? Why you came here? You're trying to get out of debt trying to make extra money trying to buy a new car Whatever and they put name email address and they click submit and they choose which one it is and they have different sales letter based on What choice that person made? Okay, because again, everyone's got different mindsets We're always assuming that this is the cookie cutter person. I'm selling to but when you do that you're shifting out You're my my friend never would notice that you don't have me a business that's doing alright Maybe you know a couple thousand bucks a month to what they're doing now Which is insane five figures plus a month just by asking a question Are you a man or you woman? Who who am I speaking to right now and then catering the whole entire message at that point to the right person? Okay, and again comes back to man and woman it comes back to pleasure or pain which type of a person are you? I'm gonna shift my message dramatically depending on who you are Okay, any questions about that at all? Okay, so it gets down I mean it gets to point where you can have a lot of different set you a lot of an ads obviously all pushing different landing pages You know I don't want you to get overwhelmed to make like 8,000 pages to start off with but usually smart to have to One that's towards pleasure and one that's away from pain Okay, then from there step back and develop your ads, okay? What are things this person is trying to get out of pain? What are the things that are interested in what are the things that they're frustrated by? Okay, if my products about to make money in there in debt How am I gonna tell you to learn my message is someone who's in debt if you don't understand So if you've never been in debt, you understand the pain that comes with that Go find someone who's in debt and spend some time in their shoes You understand the pain they're in then you can cater your message much differently as soon as you understand What that what is their feeling? One of our friends. He's a he's a famous copywriter. He lives like eight hours north of us in Idaho up in the big panhandle Idaho and he said he got hired one time to write a sales letter for for a female for a woman's product and He said he started writing this letter. He was just like I'm stuck. I don't know. I'm I know what women think. I'm right over there You know just like you know what to do is just frustrated So he sat down and so I got to figure out how to get inside the mindset of a woman I need to understand how they think so I can write and relate back to him So he went to a hair salon and he sat there He asked this hair salon owner ahead of time if he could go spend the day there So I think there's like this creepy old man sitting in a hair salon for you know eight hours He sat down the hair salon and he sat there with like a newspaper and he had a piece of paper there He listened to the women who listened to the complain about what their frustrations were what their pain payment points were things that make them Aggravated they made them happy started mapping these things out Just listen for full eight hours everything they were saying they ran home Why we still know mindsets start typing the sales letter and wrote a killer sales letter Okay, if you're coming back and you're writing the sales letter or landing page or something for someone who's in debt And you have no idea what it feels like to be in debt You're gonna knock it you're gonna struggle you just keep switching back to your torch pleasure mindset You come back saying hey you can make million dollars you can do this this and this and the person deaths like I'm not gonna make you million Bucks I'm not gonna do that. I just want to get out of debt I just want to be able to pay my you know feed my family tomorrow whatever it is You realize what's the mentality that person you're coming through? Okay, it's funny always had people that they come to our house to sell us different services You know like window washing or things like that and that was coming to me And I was like try to do this price bargain I can't get and the most guys are charging this this and this and you know We're way cheaper than this and on and on and on and looking at my mic Do you think do I look like a kind of person that's really concerned about price? I just want it done. I want done fast and I have to worry about it And so if you were selling me on hate I know you don't want to hit your Christmas lights here. I'll do it for you. It'll be done You don't even think about it That's a better selling point for me then then coming back and hey This is how cheap it is and that kind of stuff people always think it's the The people want cheaper price which isn't rarely the case people want me usually higher quality or faster or less effort So you can charge twice as in fact okay. I tell a story about about Wendy. I Met Wendy the first time She actually was doing work at our house cleaning doing all of our landscaping my wife hired She called you and someone else right and she called someone else and she I came into the whole story Basically, it was cheaper price right and Wendy came and it's like well It's gonna be cheaper But I am gonna do a way better job that kind of stuff my wife hired the person was way cheaper and person got all done and Clut came in that night and I remember she was just like this is horrible. She's like I'm gonna call Wendy I'm like we just paid all this money for it. She's like yeah, but I'd rather have it done right then She's like I'm embarrassed looks like now so we came and hired Wendy So basically paid for it two and a half times and made it look done It was beautiful as nice and we had hired her ever since come to our to our stuff and it was just amazing the difference but again because Everyone assumes that we were looking for the cheapest price which my wife was at that point But for the most part people aren't always trying to go off of price. In fact, Dan Kennedy just wrote a book recently called How to how to sell something how to Where's Kevin at Kevin show the book the flu the How to sell the affluent? Yeah, and the whole concept of the book is like especially in a down economy ever freaking out like oh crap No one has money anymore. No one wants to spend so if I need to go cheaper and cheaper And they're always trying to get cheaper rates you get cheaper and cheaper your profit margin goes away And your whole business just kind of dies in this whole book It's like that fat whole concept of the book is basically there are people with money still out there You need to find out who they are and go market till they fluent Okay, don't go and start mowing people's lawns in the trailer part because yeah You're right. They probably don't have any money But go find the rich houses and mow their lawns because they've got money still and they don't care about how much it cost They just want it done and what done nice, okay? So who you're marketing to that comes back to this whole process fair who you're marketing to but again I want to I mean I kind of off on a tangent there But the concept is really understanding who your target market is and it's gonna drive the whole thing throughout your product creation through everything else You're doing but really get understanding who they are and there's gonna be multiple target markets It's not gonna be the same person every time you're gonna have a pleasure audience and a pain audience You're gonna have Men and you're gonna have women you got different people that are attracted to different things and you need to understand that in fact In my business you guys will see January 4th or 11th 11th you'll notice We're making a huge shift in our business because what I found is With my business the kind of people I attract you can kind of tell from the audience in this room here We've got two women and all the rest you guys are men okay back home probably same thing I got a whole bunch of men who are like in it with me and they're not that many women that are kind of following me And the first time we ever actually noticed a huge surge in in our women was actually after joy She was one of our case-takes microcontinuity wrote a whole report and the next seminar We had like 30 or 40 percent of women sitting in the room and all the women were like I want to be like joy Anderson I want to be joy Anderson like everyone wanted to be joy and because of that I was like crap We need to get more female influence in our business. So multiple market off Multiple markets the other thing that's really easy to do is to is re-nitch your front-end offer So Renit your front-end offer for example Let's say you're selling a book or excuse me or re-nitch your product right here Let's say you're selling a book that's called speed reading so how to how to read faster, right? There's a huge market for people who want to learn how to speed read so you're gonna do really well with this But guess what if I change this product and I re-nitch it we're now at speed reading for realtors speed reading for students speed reading for Internet marketer speed reading for Dyslexic people I don't care you can re-nitch a thousand different times a couple cool things happen first off every time you re-nitch it It opens up a whole new target market to you But the second thing that's even cooler is that when you go to the bookstore. Let's say I am Let's say I'm a network marketer and I go and there's the speed reading section It's one of them's like you know speed reading speed reading speed reading speed reading for network marketers I'm look all these books. I'm like holy crap that one's actually written to me I'm gonna pay two three four ten twenty thirty times more money for that because it's written to me You know see exact same book. opportunity and the person interested in the product Okay, that's most people realize they always and that's this is why network marketing is such a bad bad rep Because people are going to friends and family say hey drink this magic juice It's gonna cure you oh and by the way to sign up for this bizop and this person may be interested in this But they don't want this there's a huge huge huge problem in here when you realize that say hey if I'm a network marketer I'm gonna sell the magic juice so people want the magic juice and if they raise their hand and say I want more information I'll sign up for that But then I realized there's a huge bizop crowd Let's sell the bizop to these people because they're gonna be already excited by that if I call them on the phone They're not gonna be annoyed and I'm on the phone because they're interested in that stuff already Can you realize that it makes it much easier to draw the line and say these are people I'm selling the bizop to here's I'm selling the magic juice to and boom you got two different markets there Okay, I have a lot of my friends and family members that use the product of my of my network marketing company I've never once pitched any of them an opportunity ever because well first off. Yeah, great Okay, so that's a One little thing here's an interesting we started learning about this is one of the coolest things If you guys learn just this this workshop, it was worth the s coming here. So This is something you guys are heard of bannery targeting in here. You've heard of it Kind of this is the coolest thing in the world Okay, so you can set up these campaigns called bannery targeting where someone comes this page They don't give you their name and email address and they leave you can actually follow this person Okay, so let's say we said a hundred people here on a good site We're gonna get 20 or 30 percent of people to give us a name email, right? That means, you know 70 to 80 percent of the people Come here and they leave and they never I know contact information that person's gone forever So the bannery targeting what I can do is I can place a little pixel on this site here when someone hits it and they leave my site I can follow these 70 80 percent of the people with a banner what I mean by that. Let's say you guys ever seen like Ever been to eye contact site if you notice every site you go to after that there's banner ads You see eye contacts banner ads everywhere. You're like holy crap freakin Contact must be spending ten million dollars a day on ads because every side I go to that banner ads my contact everywhere All they're doing is banner retargeting someone comes to the site and they leave and it puts a little cookie on your machine Everywhere you go it starts showing that banner shows a banner everywhere And you're the only one seeing that banner ad but because you went to their site it follows you around So if you came to my site and you didn't buy and you leave I might show banner and say hey Here's a testimony of how you know because real quick let me step back So someone came to the site and they didn't buy the reason I didn't buy is they didn't believe me for some reason, right? So I'm gonna start showing that person case studies or testimonials or some kind of proof I'm gonna follow that person around so they start following around and they go to Yahoo They go to MSN they go to Google they go to different sites and start seeing my banner ad with a big old picture Me saying here's it your her Here's a success or about how Russell did this with whatever and every day they start seeing these banner ads and me everywhere And I like holy crap a couple things first off Russell's everywhere That guy must be rich because he's everywhere Okay second off they keep seeing my face everywhere They keep seeing the brand everyone I'm telling I keep seeing over and over and over and I go this thing must work Is everywhere everywhere I go to things that and you and just keeps building this brand It follows that person around for as long as you want it to you say fall them for a week Falling for a month fall them for six months whatever you want to do the other cool thing is you can set up kind of an honor Responders you can say the first week show them this banner After day six now show them this banner after they tend to show in this banner and after they opt in and they land on this page But they haven't purchased now showing this other banner because we already have their email address We know that let's show them a different banner because now they may have a You know they trust me enough to give the name email address They didn't buy so why didn't they buy they didn't buy because they must like they don't have the money Or they have something else so you can now have a banner as a special offer discount price because that person didn't buy for some reason You can follow with that banner. Okay That pretty cool And that's for people you don't have any information at all so it's called bannery targeting I think Mason might talk about there's some companies do that kind of stuff But it's a really cool concept when you start following these people everywhere and like so the first time I saw was like contact I was like these dudes are everywhere And all this is when you go this site once they start following you and they can follow you for long as until you Delete your cookies that they follow you to the microphone over here We just set up right in front of you, you know No, I just I was learning about this from Mike Hill and I've actually been running some tests doing this with Facebook and I've been seeing an Impression to buy ratio about four to one so someone needs to see it See your banner about four times to click. I'm sorry to click to go over So it's interesting when you do that just that number of exposures is is converting a lot faster It's comes back to like, you know All the direct response guys like me we always talk trash about branding But there is some power in branding and this is building your brand people see your brand They see it you'll see an increase of type in traffic You'll see it an increase of a whole bunch of stuff because people keep seeing your brand everywhere They go and they're like, oh, this dude is rich. Did you have a question? Okay Anyway, so battery targets again That's something you're doing you drive you through this through this chain They're leaving boom start following start following start following start following them. Okay now we'll go on to the next step of the process Okay, so next thing is after they obviously give you a name and email address and they don't buy you need to put them on a killer Follow-up campaign. There's something people talk a lot about but very few people are actually doing this The first time I became a real real real believer in it is actually after Mason's working here This is Mason the bad guys you'll be hearing from him next We were running we were running we didn't add to Ark and Max which is a huge email list I think it's like three million people we spent like five Do you remember Mason? It was the five grand a four grand pay for the ad the free DVD Yeah, five grand for the ad we drove all these people this to the landing page got named email address that came here and after it was all said and done Asked me him for the numbers next day. He was like it was a bomb. He's like we only got I can't remember like 15 or 20 sales for a free CD off of five grand. I was like, oh, that's a lot of money We just wasted and I just like crap it sucks But we had this follow-up series in place it was like 15 email follow-up series Anyway, it kept going every single people get an email follow-up and the follow-ups are basically just testimonials I sent email. Hey, you know yesterday came to my site for my free CD I saw you didn't purchase it I wanted to let you show you a case study this guy who who did buy what he did with it go check it out There's a little video testimonial one of our students next thing I another video testimony every day I got a new video testimonial is talking about other people's success with our products Anyway after like 10 days he came back. He's like holy crap Russell. He's like that fall-up series did awesome I'm like, what do you mean? He said, you know, we only had like 12 or 14 the first day and after 10 days after fall-up series We had converted over as like a hundred and 120 hundred thirty people when all was said and done They went from a campaign that was hugely, you know bad to a hugely successful hugely profitable Just by having a follow-up series in place So I would say make a follow-up series email them every single day as often as you can with this fall-up series Just keep pushing people back showing them again It's it's tougher and tougher now to show case studies because of the FTC But show them things about yourself show them parts about your product They may now know show them an extra bonus just keep following up Show them new things and more things and keep following up and every time you follow up you get another percentage people are gonna buy They're gonna buy they're gonna buy okay, so page may have only converted at 1% after you fall within 10 20 30 days Might have converted at 5 6 7% just because you were following up. Okay, this goes back same as the banner that you're talking about There are a lot of studies done a long time ago I don't know if I bet the numbers are worse now and they were back then back then they said it took an average person Seven times seeing your website before they purchased Okay, and I that was again I was back at the beginning of the internet when there wasn't half as much noise as there's now I mean now it's closer to 10 to 15 times and so if you're you know They give you an email on the phone you only fall up once most people are never gonna buy from you These the quick you know the people that are the impulse buyers gonna buy really really quick Most people won't so if you're not following up them consistently over and over and over again following with banners hitting them here Here here till they get aware of your brand who you are and trust you like you know you then they're gonna start purchasing from you So make sure you have a solid follow-up sequence in place very very important Okay, next thing and again we talk a lot about this in micro continuity process. We taught that is All this traffic. I'm sending here. I basically have three goals. Okay, so goal number one Go number one just to drive a whole bunch of targeted traffic this way Go number two is from all this traffic from all these people that are coming I want to find out of all these you know swarms and swarms of people I'm sending my website Who of all these people are willing to give me a name and email address in exchange for information? Okay, this person is much more committed because they're gonna give me their name in an email Name slash email. Okay, they came through a squeeze page They gave me that email address nine those persons much more committed because they're willing to give me the name of the email Okay, the next goal I want to find out immediately afterwards is of all these people that came from traffic They gave the name email who these people are actually buyers Okay, there's different mindset of a buyer a buyer is someone who's willing to pull their credit card out of their wallet in exchange for money Okay, that person is worth a thousand times more if not more than someone who's not who's just gonna give me their name in the email address Okay, now most people they say you know often they start talking this person tell them stuff They never try selling things I want to find out as quick as possible of all these people I sent to this website who are the people that are proven buyers that are willing to purchase They're willing to buy something from me because if one thing we've learned from people over and over and over again Is that someone who buys something once is likely to buy again and again and again? Okay, which is why the whole value chain everything that we talked about earlier Why that all works so well because the buyer is a buyer is a buyer they buy and they buy and they buy Okay, I know that's the way I am when I get excited about a topic I go in and buy everything I can about that topic for a little for a short period of time But I buy and I buy and I buy and I keep buying anyone here do the same kind of thing Okay, you excited about something you're like crap. I want to know everything about this I buy this I buy this last year maybe it was two years ago when bowling as a company much the guys with bowling and Leverage back that actually beat me. He's dead But after I got back from bowling and I'm a bowling ball like I like bowling It's probably my second favorite sport behind wrestling and so I was like, you know, and I hadn't bold like two years We're gonna bowl. I was like, oh crap. I miss bowling. I got excited and we got back that night I jumped on and I like start by all his bowling stuff and books and instructional DVDs and Equipment and gear and headbands and all sorts of stuff And guess what I have not bold since the time we went out, but I got a whole bunch of crap So next time I go bowling, I'm gonna be like totally looking sweet But that's the way the mentality people are they excited about topic and they get excited and they start buying they buy and they buy and they buy So what I want to do is when someone comes on my site, I want to give their information But as quick as possible I want to find out who the people that are really interested that are hot and bothered right now They want to give me some money who those people so I like again I you guys know my my philosophy like selling something very very cheap usually free-plus shipping handling because as soon as they pull Their credit card out of their wallet. They've just qualified themselves as a buyer. They've they've proven to me that. Hey, yes, Russell I'm willing to pay for information. I'm willing to pay for a supplement I'm willing to pay for whatever is your selling they pulled out a credit card and they prove themselves as buyers Okay, now something I find right now is buyers and Buyers as soon as you know, there's someone's a buyer again because we know mentality of a buyer People are gonna buy over and over and over again. You can treat that person differently Okay, the way we treat them differently, obviously we market them a lot differently We market them offline we do phones we do direct mail we do a lot of other stuff because I know a person's Worth a lot more money to me So I'm gonna spend more time and energy and effort on that person whereas someone over here that gave me the name I just I'm probably not gonna call them and probably not gonna send the letter because there's too many people It's just that they're not qualified enough But it's as soon as they've proven they're qualified it changes the whole dynamics now You can go back and you can you can market them differently. You can create different offers for them a whole bunch of really cool stuff Okay, so buyers is really important to understand next thing you want to do is after you've gotten your buyers You want to identify who are your hyperactive buyers and we hear a hyperactive buyer? I'm a hyperactive buyer too So I do that by giving some kind of upsells because I if they've given me their credit card that's good I want to find out you know these people are good But how you know who are the best people? He said the people are most likely to buy a bunch of stuff for me So I just put them through some kind of upsells and downsells. There's a lot of ways you can do it So it's the number four would be a qualify your hyperactive qualify your hyperactive Okay, who's gonna buy more stuff so here's bunch my upsells or find who's really excited by this Who's not just like the dabbler who all you know, I'll pay for shipping handily But who's willing to put some skin in the game and really spend some money? Okay, when all said and done what happens? I get a couple lists of people I get My hypers I got my buyers and I get my subscribers and From there I can do a whole bunch of really really cool stuff. Okay. Who here already has a list? A couple guys, okay, the list is like the greatest thing in the world makes your life so much easier You know people always talk about like the internet marketing dream and how like you can print money on demand that kind of stuff That dream is true when you have a list Okay, a lot of people think you know they throw up a website and I crap isn't working They do some stuff and I'm making money the way you make money consistently is you build your list Okay, we build our list up I mean I spent probably the first two years of my business trying to build a list trying to build a list By talking about a good sized list from that point forward It's been easy because anytime I need money I'd send email out boom cash comes in this money boom send it out cash comes in Okay, so this should really be your end goal is building up a list building us subscribers Build list of buyers building list of hyperactive buyers start building those lists because that is your guaranteed payday That's when you can kind of relax it's gonna take a while for those who are just getting started takes a while Get your business going start rolling to get the wheels moving to get that stuff kind of happening But as soon as you do that, it's just it becomes easy. It's kind of like it's kind of like Pushing a huge rock a huge boulder down a hill you shot the first year pushing it you're pushing it You're like you're pushing it and you're going to a seminar and you're buying this book and you're staying up all night You're putting up your website You're trying to figure out an auto responder html code and you get it up there and start driving traffic and also it's like When it starts rolling down the hill and get speed and momentum and grows bigger and bigger and bigger and then it's just it becomes easy The game really becomes easy. That's why if you look at any industry There's a bunch of gurus in the industry and gets the gurus have that you don't have a list. That's it Most of them are very much smarter than you. I promise you that most of them are a lot dumber in you All they have is they've spent the time they push the rock down the hill They built the list and now the game becomes a lot easier Okay, so that should be a big focus this whole process is building a list the game becomes so much easier if you have a list Okay, and they get obviously from here when Garris can talk a lot more about back-end stuff today You go from here to here to here and boom here's your back-end now. Is like people are looking at like they get so overwhelmed right here's a 20 minute block This is your homework for this week do it for two for a week next week We're coming next topic the next topic and next top so I like breaking down in 20 minutes a week That's kind of my the sweet spot.
